_note_1: App Key and Callback URL come from developer.schwab.com.
_note_2: App Secret is stored securely via DPAPI — never put it in this file.
_note_3: useSandbox=true disables live order placement regardless of API connection.
_note_4: Schwab does NOT have a public sandbox API — sandbox mode prevents orders from being submitted.
_note_5: Both 'Accounts and Trading Production' and 'Market Data Production' must be added to your Schwab app.
_note_6: App must reach 'Ready for use' status (may take several days after submission).
